params.name: Chemical Bond Theory
params.description: The theory of chemical bonds elaborates on the mechanisms of mutual binding between adjacent atoms or ions in molecules or crystals. Based on the electromagnetic interactions between atoms or ions, it involves various types of chemical bonds, including covalent bonds, ionic bonds, and metallic bonds. Interactions between molecules are also considered a part of chemical bonding. The establishment and development of the theory of chemical bonds have not only enriched humanity's knowledge of the co …
